name: telegram-broadcast-kit
description: Shared kernel for scheduled Telegram channel-poster bots (rotating reminders, azkar, polls posted to a channel/group on a cron schedule, no per-user state and no database): the console logger, RTL bidi isolates, the plain-text poster, atomic JSON pointer state, content-rotation pickers, the cron error-containment wrapper, the tiny /health server, and the root .env loader. Consumed as TypeScript source (the bots run it through tsx, like their own code).

scripts.check: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test
